name: Crown-gall sensor (TraR/3OC8-HSL + CRISPRi)
shortDescription: Detects the plant pathogen Agrobacterium tumefaciens via its 3-oxo-C8-HSL quorum signal. The TraR receptor gates a CRISPRi circuit driving a visible pigment, in the soil chassis P. putida KT2440 — for agricultural crown-gall surveillance.

input.detects: The Ti-plasmid quorum signal of Agrobacterium tumefaciens (cause of crown gall disease)
input.operatingRange: TraR responds from low nM AHL

sensing.sensorMechanism: TraR binds 3OC8-HSL and activates the Ptra promoter.
sensing.signalFlow: 3OC8-HSL -> TraR activates Ptra -> transcribes an anti-pigment sgRNA -> CRISPRi represses a constitutive amilCP cassette -> pigment fades when the pathogen signal is present (NOT). Pair an inverter for colour-on.

parts.name: TraR receptor
parts.notes: 3OC8-HSL-responsive activator; works in the soil host P. putida.

output.result: Colour change indicates Agrobacterium quorum signal in soil.

performance.notes: Senses the pathogen's signal molecule, not the live organism; TraR and CRISPRi are validated separately and integration is a design template.

safety.biocontainment: Safe P. putida reads a secreted small molecule; no Agrobacterium culture required.
safety.notes: Soil chassis suited to in-field agricultural surveillance.

buildSteps.title: Design anti-pigment sgRNA
buildSteps.description: Target the amilCP promoter; check host off-targets.

buildSteps.title: Assemble units
buildSteps.description: TU1: TraR. TU2: Ptra -> sgRNA. TU3: dCas9 + constitutive amilCP. SEVA vectors.

buildSteps.title: Transform P. putida KT2440
buildSteps.description: Electroporate; select; confirm baseline pigment without AHL.

buildSteps.title: Add sample
buildSteps.description: Incubate with soil eluate + 3OC8-HSL standard curve.

provenance.source: Design template combining the Agrobacterium TraR/3OC8-HSL quorum module with P. putida CRISPRi
partsSources: Piper/Farrand / TraR quorum sensing (A. tumefaciens Ti plasmid)
provenance.license: Parts per their original sources; design template CC BY 4.0
